full_text:
He Kui (Shulong) 何夔 (叔龍)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Kui (何夔), styledShulong (叔龍), was born in Chen. Claimed Yuan Shu lacked support if he declared himself Emperor. Noted for proper behaviour. He Kui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
